design_philosophy.core_loop: Choose pitch type and placement, execute batting swing with directional aiming, field hits and throw to bases; manage team roster and player statistics
design_philosophy.primary_tension: Real-time execution of pitching/batting mechanics versus turn-based decision-making in managerial mode; arcade action integrated with simulation strategy
design_philosophy.player_fantasy: Authentic major-league baseball experience with dual control modes: direct player action on field or strategic team management
design_philosophy.what_makes_it_opinionated: HardBall III combines arcade-style real-time action control with deep managerial simulation—rejecting pure arcade simplicity while avoiding stat-heavy turn-based design. Embraces the pitcher's-mound perspective as broadcast-authentic, treating player statistics as meaningful mechanical inputs rather than cosmetic.

difficulty.player_agency_in_difficulty: Player selects pitchers from roster with varying statistics; can rearrange team composition; can adjust pitch type/placement and swing aim direction dynamically

progression.upgrade_system: Player roster with individual statistics affecting performance; managerial roster rearrangement affects gameplay
progression.unlock_mechanism: Selection of available pitchers and team configurations
replayability_hooks: Multiple pitcher selection with distinct statistical profiles

world_building_techniques: Major-league team branding and player statistics

environmental_storytelling: Player statistics indicating relative skill tiers

sources_used: wikipedia - HardBall! article (gameplay section, managerial options, pitch/batting mechanics, fielding system)
